name: job-scout
description: Personalized daily job search for Technical Program Manager, Solutions Engineer, and Forward Deployed Engineer roles. Runs setup once to capture the candidate profile, salary target, location rules, and resume; then a daily search discovers roles across LinkedIn, hiring.cafe, Wellfound, and Built In NYC, pulls clean canonical data from Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby APIs, scores each role against the profile, and writes results to local JSON (jobs.json is the source of truth) served by a local board; it can also generate company briefs, tailored application materials, and interview prep.
